specific_question: In March 2024, what was the most popular contact method for reaching customer service by MediConn Solutions' customers?
answer: In March 2024, 45% of patients preferred phone support, 32% used live chat, 20% sent emails, and 3% used social media messaging, according to a study completed in March 2024, by MediConn's IT department.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
